writeCheck.runtimeProbeDesc: After writing, performs a real resume on a temporary shadow session for verification (consumes one model call; cleaned up automatically, no messages appended to the live session). When off, only structure validation is performed (default).

motion.reduceMotionDesc: Reduce transitions and displacement animations to lower visual distraction

guideSection.guideDesc: Replay the step-by-step walkthrough of navigation, resource pane, and migration delivery
guideSection.firstRunDesc: Replay the installation and session detection results for local tools

sources.footnote: Ferry automatically discovers session directories of supported tools on this machine. Source sessions stay read-only and are not modified.

updates.currentVersionDescWeb: In-browser preview does not support in-app updates
updates.autoCheckDesc: Checks after launch with a delay; does not auto-download or install
updates.footnote: Ferry will ask for your download and install confirmation separately. You can only install and restart after the download completes.

phase.available: New version found, waiting for download confirmation
phase.downloaded: Update downloaded, waiting for install confirmation
